description: Process the HL7 ADT^A01 message located at /home/ga/sample_adt_message.hl7 through the 'HL7 Message Processor' channel in NextGen Connect. The channel is listening on TCP port 6661 for MLLP-framed messages. Verify the message receipt in the channel statistics using the web dashboard or REST API at https://localhost:8443 (credentials: admin/admin, required header for API: X-Requested-With: OpenAPI).
